# Codex Handoff Template

We are working on DealSach.

Before coding, review:

- `AGENTS.md`
- `docs/requirement-doc.md`
- `docs/frontend/frontend-req.md`
- `docs/frontend/design-system.md`
- `docs/Tickets.md`
- `docs/Repo_Current_State.md`
- `docs/Manual_Verification_Guide.md`
- `docs/Known_Issues_And_Followups.md`

Implement this ticket only.

## Manual Verification

[Manual steps]

## Project Rules

- Implement one ticket only.
- Keep changes small and manually verifiable in 5–10 minutes.
- Do not implement future-ticket features.
- Do not refactor unrelated code.
- Do not introduce new architecture unless required by this ticket.
- Avoid unnecessary dependencies.
- Use strict TypeScript in frontend work.
- Follow CodeIgniter 4 conventions in backend work.
- Preserve DealSach product boundaries from `docs/requirement-doc.md`.
- Keep Vietnamese user-facing copy Vietnamese-first.
- Do not add checkout, carts, payments, orders, reviews, ratings, vouchers, shipping comparison, or real retailer integrations.

## After Implementation, Report

- Summary of changes
- Files changed
- Commands run
- Build/test results
- Manual verification steps
- Whether docs were updated
- Risks
- Follow-up tickets
